=== Markdown Heading Plugin ===
Contributors: devuser
Tags: blocks, editor
Requires at least: 6.2
Tested up to: 6.5
Requires PHP: 8.0
Stable tag: 2.0.0
License: GPLv2 or later
License URI: https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html

Uses ## Markdown-style section headings instead of == WordPress-style ==.

## Description

Full description here using Markdown headings.
